characters.name: Characters
characters.description: The 10 main characters ofFreaks and Geeks, portrayed by the regular cast members. Thecharactersof theFreaks and GeeksTV series are the fictional people, whose experiences are shown in the 18episodesof the show. They are portrayed by thecastmembers. Depending on their importance for the show, they are divided into three different groups. Main characters are the characters who are most important for the show. They are portrayed by theregular castmembers, who are credited in theopening creditsof each episode and they appear in all 18 episodes of the TV series. Main characters are the characters who are most important for the show. They are portrayed by theregular castmembers, who are credited in theopening creditsof each episode and they appear in all 18 episodes of the TV series.

characters.name: Mentioned Characters
characters.description: This page lists characters which were mentioned in passing but never actually seen.

characters.name: Amy Andrews
characters.description: "You're in love with Tuba Girl??!!"-Daniel Desario Amy Andrewsis a student atWilliam McKinley High School. She is a tuba player in the school band. She is portrayed by actress Jessica Campbell.

characters.name: Amy Andrews
characters.description: "You're in love with Tuba Girl??!!"-Daniel Desario Amy Andrewsis a student atWilliam McKinley High School. She is a tuba player in the school band. She is portrayed by actress Jessica Campbell.

characters.name: Mr. Andopolis
characters.description: Mr. Andopolisis a recurring character onFreaks and Geeks. He is the father ofNick Andopolis. He is portrayed by Kevin Tighe. Nick's father is a military man, who doesn’t live with his wife and lives with his son and comes off as very strict, stern, and even lacking some empathy or logic. With no room for proper conversations, he more so barks orders at his son, and as such, their relationship is very strained. With no room for proper conversations, he more so barks orders at his son, and as such, their relationship is very strained.

characters.name: Nick Andopolis
characters.description: Nick AndopolisGenderMaleOccupationStudentAffiliationFreaksFamilyMr. Andopolis(father)Brothers (unnamed)Friend(s)Daniel DesarioKen MillerKim KellyRomance(s)Sara(girlfriend)Lindsay Weir(ex-girlfriend)Heidi Henderson(ex-girlfriend)Portrayed byJason SegelFirst seenEpisodesLast seenPilot18Discos and DragonsNick Andopolisis one of theFreaksatWilliam McKinley High School. He is portrayed byJason Segel. Ken MillerKim Kelly Nick is often protectingLindsay Weirfrom the others' bad comments and behavior. His main hobby is drumming and he takes part in a band (which he likes to call "Creation") withDaniel Desario,Ken Miller, andSean. His strictfatherstrongly urges him to go into the military, and encourages him to get the grades at Mckinley High School required to get in, even if he already receives poor grades at his school. Although, most of the Freaks frequently engage in marijuana consumption. Nick is depicted as the biggest drug user in the group.

characters.name: Vicki Appleby
characters.description: Vicky Applebyis the head cheerleader ofWilliam McKinley High School's cheerleading team. She is portrayed by JoAnna Garcia. Vicki comes off as the stereotypical bossy, head cheerleader at first, dismissing theGeeks, only associating with other cheerleaders and jocks, and being mean and dismissive. She concedes this behavior whenBill Haverchuckcalls her out on it and they actually have a real conversation, where Vicki reveals that she has notice how Bill is always having fun. characters.name: Bill's Father
characters.description: Bill's Fatheris the father ofBill Haverchuck. He is not currently married or even lives withBill's mother, so it is assumed they are either divorced or Bill was born out of wedlock. In "The Garage Door",  Bill discusses toNealabout Bill's father. Upon Neal's accusation that Bill doesn't even have a father, Bill remarks, "I do too!... I saw him three months ago..." In "Chokin' and Tokin'", when Bill wakes up from his coma, his mother remarks that she has to call Bill's father as "he was worried sick about you."

characters.name: Mr. Botwinick
characters.description: Mr. Botwinickis a teacher atWilliam McKinley High School. He is also the school's detention teacher. He is portrayed by Joel Madison.

characters.name: Colin
characters.description: Colin Colinis a student atWilliam McKinley High School. He is the best friend ofHarris Trinskyand is noted to be involved in theater. He is portrayed byJarrett Lennon. In "Pilot", Colin and Harris both encounterSam Weir,Neal Schweiber, andBill Haverchuckat school. TheGeekstell Colin and Harris that Alan threatens to beat up Sam and Bill. When Sam and Bill seek advice from Harris on how to avoid this, Harris states that the Geeks would earn his respect, if they fight Alan. Neal finds the idea ridiculous; however, as he walks away, he bumps into Alan, who threatens to fight him as well.

characters.name: Gordon Crisp
characters.description: Gordon Crisp Gordon Crispis one of theGeeksatWilliam McKinley High School. He is a very smelly, obese kid who is very friendly to the Geeks in biology class, health class, and gym class. He hangs out with the Geeks sometimes, most notably in the nerdy board game, Dungeons & Dragons, with them andDaniel Desario. He is portrayed by Jerry Messing.

characters.name: Daniel Desario
characters.description: Daniel DesarioNickname(s)Carlos The Dwarf(D&D)Age18GenderMaleOccupationStudentAffiliationFreaksFamilyMrs. Desario(mother)Joey Desario (brother)Friend(s)Nick AndopolisKen MillerLindsay WeirRomance(s)Kim Kelly(on/off girlfriend)Jenna Zank(former crush/ex-girlfriend)Karen Scarfolli(fling)Wendy Franklin (fling)Portrayed byJames FrancoFirst seenEpisodesLast seenPilot18Discos and DragonsDaniel Desariois the leader or the member of theFreaksatWilliam McKinley High School. He is portrayed byJames Franco. Joey Desario (brother) Daniel is best friends withNick Andopolis, and has an unsteady relationship withKim Kelly. He,Ken, and Nick have/had a band called Creation, named by Nick. He receives consistently poor grades, and has been held back twice, making him one of the oldest, if not the oldest, student in his grade. Because of this, hismomhas no problems if he were to quit school and work instead. During the series he is repeatedly portrayed as a liar, and he frequently pressuresLindsayinto doing things. Although commonly considered lazy, it's implied his aversion to doing anything is brought about by a fear of failing and being confronted by the possibility that he can't do anything right. characters.name: Mrs. Desario
characters.description: "Tell my mother I love her."-Daniel Desario Katey Desariois the mother ofDaniel Desario. She doesn't appear to approve of Daniel's high school education, and she would prefer he drop out and make money to support their low-income family, no matter the amount. She is portrayed by Alison Martin.

She is portrayed by Alison Martin.

characters.name: Eli
characters.description: Eliis an autistic student atWilliam McKinley High School. He is in the special education program, since he has speech issues, struggles with learning due to his developmental disability, and sensory sensitivities. He is portrayed by Ben Foster. In the "Pilot", while other students call Eli a slurred insult as a form of bullying, he calls himself otherwise.Lindsaysees the students making fun of him from across the hall and feels bad, so she walks over and asks him to the homecoming dance (the bullying was, in that instance, because of him going around asking random girls to the dance and consistently being rejected). He accepts the offer. However, later, he angrily refuses at the football field, after she unintentionally insulted him when she is trying to defend him from two boys, who, unbeknownst to Eli, were bullying him. He runs off in anger, only to fall, which causes him to break his arm, scream and cry. Later at the Homecoming dance, Lindsey sees Eli in a cast and decides to dance with him in an attempt to apologize to him, which does work and the two dance.

characters.name: Mr. Fleck
characters.description: Mr. Fleckis the AV teacher of theWilliam McKinley High School. He also appears to be somewhat of a guidance counselor to theGeeks. He is portrayed by Steve Higgins. He first appears in the episode "Discos and Dragons", talking to the Geeks about how their lives will get better as time goes on. Although, it may look bleak now, compared to the jocks.

characters.name: Miss Foote
characters.description: Miss Foote Miss Footeis the social studies teacher atWilliam McKinley High School. She is portrayed by Leslie Mann. In "Chokin' and Tokin'", Miss Foote is teaching about the 1960s civil rights movement in history class. Miss Foote says that Martin Luther King Jr. might have been an important figure during that time, but she questions her students to answer who actually sparked the rise of the civil rights movement.Bill Haverchuckanswers the question by claiming that it was none, other than, Rosa Parks, who refused to give up her seat on a public bus. Miss Foote praises Bill for getting the answer correct.

Miss Foote praises Bill for getting the answer correct.

characters.name: Ben Fredricks
characters.description: Ben Fredricks Ben Fredricks, or Coach Fredricks, is the physical education teacher. He is also the coach of the boys' basketball team atWilliam McKinley High School. He is currently datingGloria Haverchuck, who happens to beBill Haverchuck's mother. He is portrayed by Thomas Francis Wilson Jr. Ben Fredricks can be a bit of a jerk at times. However, he is always there to be helpful, such as when he literally risks his job to tellSam Weirthe truth about sex. Ben Fredricks can be a bit of a jerk at times. However, he is always there to be helpful, such as when he literally risks his job to tellSam Weirthe truth about sex.

characters.name: Bill Haverchuck
characters.description: Bill HaverchuckNickname(s)Little Man(byGloria)Age14GenderMaleOccupationStudent atMcKinley High SchoolAffiliationGeeksFamilyGloria Haverchuck(mother)Father(unnamed)Ben Fredricks(future step-father)Friend(s)Sam Weir(best friend)Neal Schweiber(best friend)Harris TrinskyGordon CrispRomance(s)Vicki Appleby(kissed)Maureen Sampson(crush)Miss Foote(crush)Melissa Karpinski(crush)Portrayed byMartin StarrFirst seenEpisodesLast seenPilot18Discos and Dragons Father(unnamed)Ben Fredricks(future step-father) Neal Schweiber(best friend)Harris TrinskyGordon Crisp Bill spends time with his two best friends,Neal SchweiberandSam Weir, and is probably the most socially inept geek of the three, with an awkward sense of fashion, nasally voice, and a love of the show Dallas. He does, however, show a skill at befriending others, such asMiss Foote, and most notably when he managed to make out withVicki Appleby. Despite not demonstrating any physical talents, Bill is ambitious to be an athlete, lamenting the fact that he is automatically overshadowed by the jocks (Feig has gone on record explaining Bill would've joined the Basketball team if the show had been given a second season). This leads him to be often at ends with his gym teacher and possible future step-father,Coach Fredericks, especially when he starts dating Bill's mother.

characters.name: Heidi Henderson
characters.description: Heidi Henderson's first appearance. Heidi Hendersonis the ex-girlfriend ofNick Andopolis. She is portrayed bySamantha Shelton. In "Girlfriends and Boyfriends", Heidi meetsLindsayand Nick atWilliam McKinley High School. Nick is disgusted to see Heidi, who simply walks away from them. Lindsay asks Nick who was that girl. Nick responds that Heidi is nothing, but bad news by claiming that she is a liar.

characters.name: Herbert
characters.description: Herbert Herbertis a student atWilliam McKinley High School. He is the school's mascot until he was temporarily replaced bySam Weir, after he accidentally broke his right arm when he fell off of the Cheerleaders' back in "We've Got Spirit" during a performance. He is portrayed byShia LaBeouf.

He is portrayed byShia LaBeouf.

characters.name: Howie Gelfand
characters.description: Howie Gelfand Howie Gelfandis a young man who works as a retail employer at the Silvermen's clothing store. He is portrayed by Jason Schwartzman. In "Carded and Discarded", Howie asks theFreaksof what clothes do they need in the clothing store. The Freaks are not interested in buying clothes, and they inform Howie to gain fake IDs from him to watch the band,Feedback, perform at a local bar. Howie examines the appearance ofLindsay Weir. Howie charges the Freaks about 100 bucks for them to receive their IDs for the next day.

characters.name: Humphries
characters.description: Humphries Humphriesis a student atWilliam McKinley High School. He is also the friend or follower of fellow bully,Alan White, and the bully to theGeeks. He is portrayed by Michael Beardsley.

characters.name: Jenna Zank
characters.description: Jenna Zank "You know what punkers don't do? Call themselves punkers."-Jenna, to Daniel Desario Jenna Zankis a high school dropout fromWilliam McKinley High Schoolwho is into the punk scene. She wasDaniel Desario's crush, and she is his ex-girlfriend. She is portrayed by Shawnee Free Jones.

characters.description: Jenna Zank "You know what punkers don't do? Call themselves punkers."-Jenna, to Daniel Desario Jenna Zankis a high school dropout fromWilliam McKinley High Schoolwho is into the punk scene. She wasDaniel Desario's crush, and she is his ex-girlfriend. She is portrayed by Shawnee Free Jones.

characters.name: Chip Kelly
characters.description: "Chip, he's a sweet kid, but he's got water in his brain."-Cookie Kelly Chip KellyisKim Kelly's older brother. He is also the son ofCookie Kellyand the stepson of Mr. Kelly. After a night out drinking with friends, Chip was beaten by police, resulting in severe head injuries. These injuries left Chip permanently incapacitated, to the point where most his time is spent sleeping on the living room couch. He is also described byCookie Kelly, in a conversation withHarold WeirandJean Weir, as having "water in his brain". Likely in reference to his sustained injuries. Chip is portrayed byMike White.

characters.name: Cookie Kelly
characters.description: Cookie Kellyis arecurring characterof theFreaks and GeeksTV series. She is the mother ofKimberly "Kim" KellyandChip Kellyand the wife of Mr. Kelly. Cookie and her husband, Kim's step-father, are rivals of Kim. She is portrayed byAnn Dowd. Cookie first appears in thefourth episode, in which she allows her daughter to inviteLindsay Weirto the Kelly home, since Lindsay has enough with the way Kim treats her by not being allowed to get to learn about the Kelly family, unlike how Kim gets to know Lindsay's family. Cookie and her husband welcomes them to family lunch. Kim tells Lindsay that the former needs to bring home someone better than the rest of herFreak friendsto prove to her parents that she isn't a loser. In other words, Kim lies to her parents that Lindsay owns a richer house, and she is with a normal family and friends, rather than with the Weir family. Cookie calls out on Kim's deception. As a result, the dinner turns into a massive dramatic fight, causing the girls to run away from Kim's emotionally unstable or raging parents and Lindsay taking the key from Mr. Kelly for Kim to drive herself and Lindsay away, in her family's stolen car, from the Kelly home.

characters.name: Kim Kelly
characters.description: Kim KellyGenderFemaleOccupationStudent atMcKinley High SchoolAffiliationFreaksFamilyCookie Kelly(mother)Chip Kelly(brother)Step Father(unnamed)Aunt Kathy(deceased)Friend(s)Lindsay Weir(best friend)Nick AndopolisKen MillerKaren Scarfolli(formerly)Millie Kentner(formerly)Romance(s)Daniel Desario(on/off boyfriend)Portrayed byBusy PhilippsFirst seenEpisodesLast seenPilot18Discos and Dragons Chip Kelly(brother)Step Father(unnamed)Aunt Kathy(deceased) Nick AndopolisKen MillerKaren Scarfolli(formerly)Millie Kentner(formerly) Kim is hostile towards Lindsay in the first few episodes and inKim Kelly Is My Friend. However, when Kim told Lindsay that she wanted to hang out with Lindsay only to prove hermotherthat she has "good" friends, they later become best friends. Kim is also friends withNick AndopolisandKen Miller. Kim lives with her mother Cookie, step-father, and brother,Chip Kelly. Kim has an unstable, emotionally abusive relationship with her rageaholic parents. Kim's main appearance is having long blonde hair with a black eyeliner, and sporting jeans with T-shirts and a light blue jacket.

characters.name: Millie Kentner
characters.description: Millie KentnerAge15GenderFemaleOccupationStudent atWilliam McKinley High SchoolAffiliationMathletesFamilyMrs. Kentner(mother)Mr. Kentner(father)Toby(cousin)Goliath (pet dog)Friend(s)Lindsay WeirKim Kelly(formerly)CareyErinRomance(s)Tommy(boyfriend)Portrayed bySarah HaganFirst seenEpisodesLast seenPilot11Dead Dogs and Gym Teachers Millie KentnerisLindsay's former, nerdy best friend and a former member of theMathletes. She is portrayed by Sarah Hagan. Millie Kentner is 15-years-old. She's a steadfast Christian and abstains from drinking and smoking. She often comments on Lindsay's change of behavior, and fears theFreaksare leading her astray. Millie Kentner is 15-years-old. She's a steadfast Christian and abstains from drinking and smoking. She often comments on Lindsay's change of behavior, and fears theFreaksare leading her astray. Despite this, Millie remains loyal to Lindsay. She respects Lindsay's decisions and is always willing to help her, although she laments that they are growing apart from each other.
